case_title: SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION VS TANTIADO, FLORA FELISA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $709.87 FILED BY SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT TANTIADO, FLORA FELISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TANTIADO, FLORA FELISA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFEAMERICA CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANTIADO, FLORA FELISA $570.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $681.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-19-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-22-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLED BY AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TANTIADO, FLORA FELISA
